---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Modalith Studio
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or log output to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15]
- **Compiler:** [e.g., MSVC 19.40, GCC 14, Clang 18]
- **Qt Version:** [e.g., 6.7]
- **Modalith Version:** [e.g., 0.2.1]
- **Build Type:** [Debug / Release]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
